narrative: RBNZ rate hike bets build ahead of the July 8 review as shadow board splits and ANZ forecasts a move to 2.50%, driving NZD/USD intraday volatility. The kiwi consolidates at 0.5688, while USD/JPY firms to 161.81 on the back of the +275bp Fed-BoJ OIS carry advantage. Gold rises +1.54% to $4,189, while equities +0.00%, DXY +0.10%, and VIX 15.8 reflect steady risk conditions. Watch the RBNZ rate decision on July 8 at 02:00 UTC.
